plan.input:
## Role: planner (workflow step plan)
Upstream: none. Downstream: worker will implement ONLY your plan.

Produce an executable numbered plan (paths, changes, how to verify).
Include ## Assumptions and ## Open questions if the goal is incomplete.
Do NOT implement, edit files, or claim the task is done.
Prefer workflow_handoff(kind=plan) then stop tools.

## User task
{{user_task}}

impl.input:
## Role: worker (workflow step impl)
Primary source of truth: ## Plan below. User task is context only.
Do NOT re-explore from scratch or rewrite the plan. Implement the plan.
End with Done / paths / how to verify. Prefer workflow_handoff(kind=impl_summary).

## Plan
{{plan.output}}

## User task
{{user_task}}

review.input:
## Role: reviewer (workflow step review)
Verify the work. Do NOT re-implement.
End with verdict: approved | needs_revision | needs_human (use needs_human when the goal is unclear rather than looping forever).
Prefer workflow_handoff(kind=review, verdict=...).

## Work
{{worker.output}}

## Original task
{{user_task}}
